title: Lead Instructional Designer at Narayana Group

jsonLd.title: Lead Instructional Designer at Narayana Group
jsonLd.description:
Join the Narayana Group family as a Instructional Designer in Gurgaon. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Narayana Group:
Narayana Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Support students with special educational needs
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Narayana Group!
